allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='C:/Users/david/.claude/projects/c--Projects-pikopark-online/b370957d-d1d7-4a89-9e7c-1cce6ab569d2.jsonl'; const lines=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); console.log\('Total:',lines.length\); lines.slice\(-60\).forEach\(l=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(l\);const m=d.message||{};if\(m.role==='assistant'\){\(m.content||[]\).forEach\(c=>{if\(c.type==='text'\)console.log\('A:',c.text.slice\(0,400\),'\\n---'\)}\);}else if\(m.role==='user'\){\(m.content||[]\).forEach\(c=>{if\(c.type==='text'\)console.log\('U:',c.text.slice\(0,300\),'\\n---'\);}\)}}catch\(e\){}}\);")
